calendar.matters:
Petition For Recovery Of Atty'S Fees & Costs; Declaration Of Craig R. Johnston
Off Calendar Mar-07-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: John Foley appearing for Alan Tetenbaum. David Millstein appearing for Ms. Silverstein. Craig Johnston appearing for and with Don Maier, trustee. The trustee is not asking for fees for himself. He is asking for reimbursement of attorney's fees and costs. He wants Ms. Silverstein to pay part of the attorney's fees. Mr. Foley is objecting to payment of fees from the trust. Mr. Millstein is objecting to payment of fees from Ms. Silverstein. Matter submitted. With no objections to the petition to terminate trust, petition is granted. OSC re: contempt is off calendar. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
